question: The chart shows the annual budget distribution of City A in various sectors. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: The combined budget for Education and Safety is larger than the budget for Healthcare.
options.B: Healthcare receives a larger share of the budget than Infrastructure.
options.C: Healthcare receives more budget than all other sectors combined.
options.D: Infrastructure receives the largest share of the budget among all sectors.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Healthcare: 55%; Education: 20%; Safety: 15%; Infrastructure: 10%.
